heading: Recipient’s choice of institution
label: 4505 Recipient’s choice of institution
text: Fellowship recipients may attend any institution of higher education in the United States with an accredited graduate program which offers courses of study or training which emphasize the origins of the Constitution of the United States, its principles, its development, and its comparison with other forms of government, as determined according to criteria established by the Foundation.
notes: Codificationis a corrected version of .Pub. L. 99–591Pub. L. 99–500
